result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 27:     AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
),
case_transfer_flag AS (
  SELECT caseid__c,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN case_transfer_flag tf ON tf.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN case_owner_counts coc ON coc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND coc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
),
case_transfer_flag AS (
  SELECT caseid__c,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN case_transfer_flag tf ON tf.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN case_owner_counts coc ON coc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND coc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
),
case_owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
),
case_transfer_flag AS (
  SELECT caseid__c,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN case_transfer_flag tf ON tf.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN case_owner_counts coc ON coc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND coc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closed_ts - ec.created_ts))) ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
),
case_owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
),
case_transfer_flag AS (
  SELECT caseid__c,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN case_transfer_flag tf ON tf.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS closed_cases_no_transfer_past4mo
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN case_owner_counts coc ON coc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND coc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY closed_cases_no_transfer_past4mo DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query: SELECT createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE createddate IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE createddate IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02 00:00:00+00' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
),
case_owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE trim(ch.field__c) = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
),
case_transfer_flag AS (
  SELECT caseid__c,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE trim(field__c) = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS owner_id,
         (c.createddate::timestamptz) AS created_ts,
         (NULLIF(c.closeddate,'None')::timestamptz) AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN case_transfer_flag tf ON tf.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE NULLIF(c.closeddate,'None') IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamptz >= p.start_ts
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN case_owner_counts coc ON coc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND coc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closed_ts - ec.created_ts))) ASC
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case" c

  WHERE NULLIF(c.closeddate,'None') IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamptz >= p.start_ts
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN case_owner_counts coc ON coc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND coc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closed_ts - ec.created_ts))) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02 00:00:00+00' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS closed_past4mo
FROM "Case" c, params p
WHERE NULLIF(c.closeddate,'None') IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate::timestamptz >= p.start_ts;

args.query: SELECT trim(field__c) AS field, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT trim(field__c) AS field, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02 00:00:00+00' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE trim(field__c) = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY 1
),
case_transfer_flag AS (
  SELECT caseid__c,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE trim(field__c) = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS owner_id,
         (c.createddate::timestamptz) AS created_ts,
         (NULLIF(c.closeddate,'None')::timestamptz) AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN case_transfer_flag tf ON tf.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE NULLIF(c.closeddate,'None') IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamptz >= p.start_ts
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
)
SELECT ec.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM eligible_cases ec
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = ec.owner_id AND acc.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ec.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closed_ts - ec.created_ts))) ASC
LIMIT 1;
